ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/78/xiaozhi-esp32
Language: c++
An MCP-based chatbot | 一个基于MCP的聊天机器人

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alexays/Waybar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alexays/Waybar
Language: c++
Highly customizable Wayland bar for Sway and Wlroots based compositors. ✌️ 🎉

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MAZHARMIK/Interview_DS_Algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MAZHARMIK/Interview_DS_Algo
Language: c++
Super Repository for Coding Interview Preperation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MariaDB/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MariaDB/server
Language: c++
MariaDB server is a community developed fork of MySQL server. Started by core members of the original MySQL team, MariaDB actively works with outside developers to deliver the most featureful, stable, and sanely licensed open SQL server in the industry.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cutlass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass
Language: c++
CUDA Templates and Python DSLs for High-Performance Linear Algebra

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OSGeo/gdal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal
Language: c++
GDAL is an open source MIT licensed translator library for raster and vector geospatial data formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ROCm/rocm-systems
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ROCm/rocm-systems
Language: c++
super repo for rocm systems projects

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZLMediaKit/ZLMediaKit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZLMediaKit/ZLMediaKit
Language: c++
WebRTC/RTSP/RTMP/HTTP/HLS/HTTP-FLV/WebSocket-FLV/HTTP-TS/HTTP-fMP4/WebSocket-TS/WebSocket-fMP4/GB28181/SRT/STUN/TURN server and client framework based on C++11

ns0:entry.ns0:title: argotorg/solidity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/argotorg/solidity
Language: c++
Solidity, the Smart Contract Programming Language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: catchorg/Catch2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2
Language: c++
A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gabime/spdlog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gabime/spdlog
Language: c++
Fast C++ logging library.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/googletest
Language: c++
GoogleTest - Google Testing and Mocking Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c++
Google's Operations Research tools:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/perfetto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/perfetto
Language: c++
Production-grade client-side tracing, profiling, and analysis for complex software systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jarczakpawel/BMCU-C-PJARCZAK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jarczakpawel/BMCU-C-PJARCZAK
Language: c++
BMCU 370C (Hall) firmware for Bambu Lab A1 / A1 mini / P1S with buffer calibration - all known issues fixed, 100% AMS-compatible behavior.

URL: https://github.com/microsoft/WSL
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openxla/xla

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ossrs/srs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ossrs/srs
Language: c++
SRS is a simple, high-efficiency, real-time media server supporting RTMP, WebRTC, HLS, HTTP-FLV, HTTP-TS, SRT, MPEG-DASH, and GB28181, with codec support for H.264, H.265, AV1, VP9, AAC, Opus, and G.711.
